title: Senior Doctor - Merck India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Merck India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Merck India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Surat office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Merck India:
Merck India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
